title: avena pratensis var. gayana
intro: Avena pratensis var. gayana, also known as oat grass or meadow oat grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the oat family. The medicinal properties of Avena pratensis var. gayana include its calming and soothing effects, which can help reduce stress and anxiety. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote restful sleep, alleviate insomnia, and soothe digestive issues. Avena pratensis var. gayana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
